name: O'Kims
tagline: Korean fusion with French and Japanese technique — Yelp's #58 US restaurant in 2024. Truffle mandoo that'll rewire your brain.
mustOrder: truffle mandoo — Korean dumplings elevated with truffle
kalbi short ribs — the classic, perfectly executed
black sesame cake — don't skip dessert
parking: Street parking on Nuuanu Ave; paid lots on Smith/Maunakea St
talkStory: Chef Hyun Kim applies French, Italian, and Japanese techniques to Korean and local ingredients — the result is something genuinely new. Family-run on Nuuanu Ave in Chinatown, not a tourist magnet. Named Yelp's #58 of the Top 100 US Restaurants in 2024 — earned through real quality, not tourist review volume. Extensive vegan options including vegan kimchi. The small patio out back is a nice touch. Lunch and dinner, closed Mondays.
